title: gymnadenia cyclochila
intro: Gymnadenia cyclochila, also known as the terrestrial orchid or fragrant orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gymnadenia cyclochila include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and aid in the treatment of various other health conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, which are commonly used in herbal medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
